arts.ttl: Bologna vs. Juventus, fourth place at stake
arts.sum: Should Bologna win, they will overtake Juventus in the table with three games to go: the Rossoblù have never been ahead of the Bianconeri with three games to go in a 20-team Serie A season. Juventus are unbeaten in their last 25 Serie A matches against Bologna (W17 D8): it’s their longest current streak of consecutive games without a defeat in the competition; the last Rossoblù win against the Bianconeri in the top-flight was back to February 26th 2011 (0-2, at Torino, thanks to Marco Di Vaio’s brace).
